title: Cash Flow Gap Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool to calculate and analyze cash flow gaps using Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC standards. Identifies hidden loss drivers and provides actionable recommendations.

inputs.label: Average Days Receivable (DSO)
inputs.businessContext: Average number of days to collect payment after a sale. High DSO indicates potential cash flow issues.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of days to collect payment after a sale. High DSO indicates potential cash flow issues.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir satıştan sonra tahsilat için geçen ortalama gün sayısı. Yüksek DSO, potansiyel nakit akışı sorunlarını gösterir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Anzahl Tage bis zum Zahlungseingang nach einem Verkauf. Ein hoher DSO deutet auf mögliche Cashflow-Probleme hin.

inputs.label: Average Days Payable (DPO)
inputs.businessContext: Average number of days to pay suppliers. Higher DPO can improve cash flow but may strain supplier relationships.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of days to pay suppliers. Higher DPO can improve cash flow but may strain supplier relationships.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçilere ödeme yapmak için geçen ortalama gün sayısı. Daha yüksek DPO nakit akışını iyileştirebilir ancak tedarikçi ilişkilerini zorlayabilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Anzahl Tage bis zur Zahlung an Lieferanten. Ein höherer DPO kann den Cashflow verbessern, aber Lieferantenbeziehungen belasten.

inputs.label: Inventory Days (DII)
inputs.businessContext: Average number of days inventory is held before sale. High DII ties up cash and increases holding costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of days inventory is held before sale. High DII ties up cash and increases holding costs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Envanterin satıştan önce elde tutulduğu ortalama gün sayısı. Yüksek DII, nakdi bağlar ve elde tutma maliyetlerini artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Anzahl Tage, die der Lagerbestand vor dem Verkauf gehalten wird. Ein hoher DII bindet Kapital und erhöht die Lagerkosten.

inputs.label: Daily Operating Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Total daily operating costs including labor, materials, overhead. Used to compute cash gap in monetary terms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total daily operating costs including labor, materials, overhead. Used to compute cash gap in monetary terms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşçilik, malzeme, genel giderler dahil toplam günlük işletme maliyetleri. Nakit açığını parasal olarak hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Tägliche Betriebskosten einschließlich Arbeit, Material, Gemeinkosten. Wird verwendet, um die Cash-Lücke in Geldbeträgen zu berechnen.

inputs.label: Daily Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Average daily revenue from sales. Used to compute cash conversion cycle and gap.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average daily revenue from sales. Used to compute cash conversion cycle and gap.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satışlardan elde edilen ortalama günlük gelir. Nakit dönüşüm döngüsü ve açığını hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher täglicher Umsatz aus Verkäufen. Wird verwendet, um den Cash-Conversion-Zyklus und die Cash-Lücke zu berechnen.

inputs.label: Supplier Payment Terms
inputs.businessContext: Standard payment terms offered by suppliers. Affects DPO and cash gap.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard payment terms offered by suppliers. Affects DPO and cash gap.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçiler tarafından sunulan standart ödeme koşulları. Borç ödeme gün sayısını (DPO) ve nakit açığını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Zahlungsbedingungen der Lieferanten. Beeinflusst DPO und Cash-Lücke.

inputs.label: Customer Payment Behavior
inputs.businessContext: Historical customer payment behavior. Adjusts effective DSO.

businessContext_i18n.en: Historical customer payment behavior. Adjusts effective DSO.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geçmiş müşteri ödeme davranışı. Efektif alacak tahsilat gün sayısını (DSO) ayarlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Historisches Zahlungsverhalten der Kunden. Passt den effektiven DSO an.

inputs.label: Lean Inventory Practices Active
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if Lean inventory methods (e.g., JIT) are in place to reduce inventory days.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if Lean inventory methods (e.g., JIT) are in place to reduce inventory days.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Envanter günlerini azaltmak için yalın envanter yöntemlerinin (örn. JIT) uygulanıp uygulanmadığını belirtir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gibt an, ob Lean-Bestandsmethoden (z. B. JIT) zur Reduzierung der Lagerbestandstage eingesetzt werden.

rules.message: DSO is less than DPO. This may indicate favorable cash flow but verify payment terms consistency.
Lean inventory flag is active but inventory days exceed 30. Consider JIT or reducing safety stock.
Sigma level below 3.0 indicates high defect rates, increasing cash tied in rework and scrap.

thresholds.message: Cash gap exceeds 30 days. Immediate action recommended to reduce DSO or inventory.
Cash gap value exceeds 500,000 currency units. High risk of liquidity issues.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
